ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player (e.g., RF, SS, 1B) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., LAD 5, NY 3) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, cloudy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance in a game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "left_on_base" INTEGER /* Number of runners left on base */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average for the game */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) for the game */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., RF, SS, 1B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's position in a game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "innings_played" INTEGER /* Number of innings played at the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed (e.g., game stats, season stats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the event occurred */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., home run, strikeout) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
